name: Funnel Cakes 3
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together all dry ingredients.
2. Mix the egg and milk in a separate bowl.
3. Gradually add the wet mixture to the dry mixture. Beat until smooth. (You may need more milk; add gradually until you achieve the consistency of pancake batter.)
4. Fill the pan with about 1 inch of cooking oil and heat as for cooking doughnuts.
5. Hold your finger over the bottom of a funnel.
6. Pour approximately 1/4 cup batter into the center of the hot oil using the funnel.
7. Remove your finger, allowing the batter to drop in a spiral motion into the pan of hot oil.
8. Fry until golden brown, turning once with tongs.
9. Remove from the pan and drain on paper towels.
10. Sprinkle with powdered sugar and serve hot. (Makes 6 funnel cakes.)
- At the fair, these are also served with a cinnamon/sugar mix sprinkled on them. I'm still trying to decide which is better. I think I need to try both of them again .
